She stood on the {bus} because it was full.

examples.target: She took the {train} to the city.

examples.source: Tren zamanında geldiği için zamanında ulaştı.

He repaired the old {boat} in his yard.
She used a {boat} to reach the other shore.

examples.target: He is in the same {boat} as the rest of us.
She walked along the {road} to the village.

examples.target: She crossed the {road} carefully.

examples.target: She took the long {road} to enjoy the view.
examples.source: Manzaranın tadını çıkarmak için uzun yolu tercih etti.

examples.target: He had to stay in his own {lane}.

examples.target: She dreamed of becoming a {pilot}.
